prompt: Build me a product card component in a single HTML file with inline CSS. The card should show a food delivery order: a burrito bowl from Chipotle, priced at $32.45, delivering from Syracuse NY to Jamesville NY, scheduled for today at 9:30am. Include a food image placeholder at the top. Make it look polished and professional.

assertions.text: Title (Burrito Bowl) uses a larger or bolder font than secondary text (time, location)
Price ($32.45) uses a non-black color (e.g., blue) and is visually separated from the title
Spacing values (margin, padding, gap) are multiples of 4px
Card uses box-shadow with low opacity (rgba alpha <= 0.15) not a heavy dark shadow
An image element or image placeholder div appears before/above the text content
Location info uses visual indicators (SVG icons, emoji pins, symbols) not just plain text labels
